commands.review_summary:
The branch updates logging redaction to preserve same-key shell environment placeholders in tool payloads and session transcripts while still masking literal secrets, with focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +55, Tests +124. Total +179 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current release/main source shows assignment values are masked without a shell-placeholder preserve path, and the PR includes a real LM Studio local-agent transcript scan showing the fixed behavior; I did not rerun it during this read-only review.
